title: Shadow Chase
description: A sunny-day science walk where kids chase, shape, and revisit real shadows, then stamp their observations into a shadow diary.
learningGoals: Connect sunlight with the shadows made by bodies and objects
Notice how shadows change across the day
Practice outdoor observation through whole-body movement
interactionModel: observe-journal prompts send the child outside to move and observe, then large tap targets stamp one open-ended shadow observation per page
feedbackModel: Every observation is welcomed with pop, whoosh, and sparkle SFX plus a playful spoken movement nudge; the recap presents the completed shadow diary.

modes.title: Morning Shadows
modes.skill: observe and move with body and object shadows

modes.title: All-Day Watch
modes.skill: compare one shadow across morning, noon, and evening

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
